bulk_A0_G0: a pullback potential acts on the bulk trace; it is not automatically a potential for independent sigma_partial
bulk_elimination: may generate controlled nonlocal terms only after a boundary source is specified
claim_boundary: Boundary Axiom B1 and its intrinsic action are a provisional freeze, not a P1 derivation. Exact intrinsic M4 Lorentz structure is obtained, while one-normalization coefficient locking, the shifted junction background, scalar potential, full spectrum, physical gauge interpretation, absolute units, fermions, and Standard Model closure remain open.
curvature: no sigma R term exists in the freeze
exact_matching: sigma_partial=sigma_bulk| would undo the intrinsic-field ontology and reintroduce trace-field kinetics
